description: Enterprise policy configuration for the Anti-Phishing extension.

org_id.title: Organization ID
org_id.description: Unique identifier for the organization (e.g. 'acme-corp'). Used to attribute phishing detections to the correct org in the dashboard.

user_email.title: User Email
user_email.description: Email address of the user running this extension. Used for event attribution and alerts.

api_endpoint.title: API Endpoint
api_endpoint.description: Base URL of the anti-phishing API server (e.g. 'https://phishing-api.acme.com'). Overrides the default localhost endpoint.
